name_en: Code: 665717 Small Size View 🏆[MCM] Classic: Side Double Row Studs. Made from our iconic Visetos coated canvas. Features a luxurious sheepskin lining 🐑. Includes a tablet 💻 pocket inside. YKK zipper. Copper plate with independent code 🔢 not repeated.
